description: Tracks which bubble categories have been audited/expanded by agents, so future sessions know what's been reviewed and what still needs attention.

translation.notes: 5 language pairs x 5 tones = 25 leaves. Deep 3-level nesting. All spans have suggestions, no OOO placeholders, adequate span counts. No changes needed.

read.notes: 11 children (5 primary, 6 secondary). Phase A: added resume and transcript leaves. Phase B: added editable spans to 5 templates (readFactCheck, readEmail, readWebpage, readCompare, readDocument). 7 new spans total.
pending_improvements: readCode and readResearch still have only 1 span each — candidates for next span audit
readWebpage rw1-url is free-form (no suggestions needed per policy)

build.notes: 13 children (5 primary, 8 secondary). Phase A skipped (10+ children). Phase B: replaced OOO placeholders and added suggestions to 5 templates (buildWebsite, buildApp, buildApi, buildBot, buildScript). 7 spans fixed total.
pending_improvements: 8 remaining templates still have OOO placeholders: buildPresentations, buildDatabase, buildGame, buildCliTool, buildDashboard, buildAutomation, buildComponent, buildExtension
buildExtension be3-purpose and buildCliTool bcli3-purpose still lack suggestions

organize.notes: 10 children, well-balanced. Span quality improved: added suggestions to 3 templates (reports, products, timeline), added 2 new spans each to schedule and notes templates.
pending_improvements: organizeCsv and organizeDatabase still have only 1 span each — candidates for next span audit

summarize.notes: 10 children (3 primary, 7 secondary). Phase A: added email and report leaves. Phase B: replaced OOO in summarizePodcast, added suggestions to summarizeArticle sa1-topic, added sm3-length span to summarizeMeeting. Only remaining diagnostic issue: summarizeBook sb1-title (free-form, skip per policy).
pending_improvements: summarizeBook sb1-title has no suggestions — free-form field, skipped by policy

debug.notes: 10 children (5 primary, 5 secondary). Phase A: added testing and data pipeline leaves. Phase B: added suggestions to 5 spans (df2-error, db2-error, dd2-error, da1-endpoint, dv2-error). All spans now have suggestions, diagnostic returns [].

brainstorm.notes: 10 children (5 primary, 5 secondary), well-structured. Phase A skipped (10+ children). Phase B: added suggestions to 5 primary template topic spans (brainstormProduct, brainstormMarketing, brainstormContent, brainstormDesign, brainstormStrategy).
pending_improvements: brainstormNaming bn1-what and brainstormProblemSolving bps1-problem still lack suggestions — candidates for next span audit

learn.notes: Expanded from 5 to 10 children. Added history, design, music, cooking, finance as secondary.

write.notes: Expanded from 5 to 10 children. Added socialMedia, resume, report, copy, speech as secondary.

explain.notes: Expanded from 5 to 8 children. Added data, math, legal as secondary.

structural_issues.issue: read category mixes source types and analysis modes
structural_issues.recommendation: Remove read-summary, read-keypoints, read-full; add read-contract, read-spreadsheet

structural_issues.issue: write-email is too broad for one of the most common AI use cases
build-website and build-app could benefit from sub-branches
structural_issues.recommendation: Split website into landing/portfolio/ecommerce; app into mobile/desktop/web
